message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
title PD parse detail

participant "Chi" as Chi
participant "pipeline" as pipeline
participant "pdlibwrapper\ncamxpdlibwrapper.cpp" as pdlibwrapper
participant "pdlibinterface\ncamxpdlibinterface.cpp" as pdlibinterface
participant "camxsensornode.cpp" as camxsensornode
participant "camxpdlibraryhandler.cpp" as camxpdlibraryhandler

activate Chi
activate pipeline

note right of Chi: ChiPDEntry[] = "ChiPDLibraryEntry"\nChiASDEntry[] = "ChiASDAlgorithmEntry"\nChiAFDEntry[] = "ChiAFDAlgorithmEntry"\nChiAWBEntry[] = "ChiAWBAlgorithmEntry"\nChiAFEEntry[] = 'ChiAFEAlgorithmEntry'\nfrom this text, can get Algorithm Entry

box "chi stats algo" #red
end box

box "PD lib create" #red
end box

Chi -> Chi: ProbeChiComponents
activate Chi
Chi -> Chi: GetAECAIgorithmCallback
deactivate Chi
activate Chi
Chi -> Chi: GetAFDAIgorithmCallback
deactivate Chi
activate Chi
Chi -> Chi: GetAFAIgorithmCallback
deactivate Chi
activate Chi
Chi -> Chi: GetAWBAIgorithmCallback
deactivate Chi
activate Chi
Chi -> Chi: GetASDAIgorithmCallback
deactivate Chi
activate Chi
Chi -> Chi: GetPDLibraryCallback
deactivate Chi
activate Chi
Chi -> Chi: GetHVXAIgorithmCallback
deactivate Chi
Chi --> Chi: return
deactivate Chi

note left of Chi: These Callback used in camxpipeline.cpp\nwhen call pipeline.CreateNodes

note left of Chi: for m_pStatscallback.pPDCallback\ncontain these interface\npCallBacks->pfnGetCapabilities = PDWrapperGetCapabilities;\npCallBacks->pfnCreate = CreatePDLibWrapper;\npCallBacks->pfnQueryVendorTag = NULL;\npCallBacks->pfnSetAlgInterface = PDWrapperSetNodeInterface;

pipeline -> pdlibwrapper: CreatePDLibWrapper
activate pdlibwrapper
pdlibwrapper -> pdlibwrapper: CamX::LoadPDLib
activate pdlibwrapper
note right of pdlibwrapper: "%s%s%s.%s"\n"VendorLibPath"\n"PathSeparator"\n"pLibName"\n"SharedLibraryExtension"
pdlibwrapper --> pdlibwrapper: return Addr
deactivate pdlibwrapper
pdlibwrapper --> pipeline: pfnCreate
pdlibwrapper --> pipeline: return
deactivate pdlibwrapper

box "call PD lib" #red
end box

note right of pipeline: in dir:\n1. camx-lib-3a/system/statsalgo/pdlib\n2. camx-lib/system/statsalgo/pdlibsony\nboth have camxpdlibinterface.cpp

box "Init PDLib" #red
end box

note left of pipeline: for pipeline create, will create every node\nand pdlib is init in sensor node

pipeline -> camxsensornode: ProcessingNodeFinalizeInitialization
activate camxsensornode
note right of camxsensornode: 1. ReadEEPROMData\n2. GetCSIInfo\n3. GetOTPData\n4. PopulatePDAFInformation\n5. PublishPDAFInformation\nwhy we need publish this info?\nactually for PropertyIDSensorPDAFInfo, in IFE PDPCv1.1 and BPS PDPC2.0 will use it.\nsince type 3 sensor will not do pdpc
camxsensornode -> camxsensornode: LoadPDLibrary
activate camxsensornode
camxsensornode -> camxpdlibraryhandler: CPDLibHandler::CreateLib
activate camxpdlibraryhandler
deactivate camxpdlibraryhandler
deactivate camxsensornode
deactivate camxsensornode

@enduml
```
